name: 销售经理形象照（男）
description: 销售经理职业形象照，展现亲和力与说服力，适合销售经理、大客户经理、商务拓展
style_prompt: Sales manager portrait, confident and friendly expression, persuasive charm, approachable business winner, dynamic professional energy
background_prompt: Modern corporate office or city view blur, success-oriented environment, dynamic business atmosphere
clothing_prompt: Sharp business attire, well-fitted suit in navy or charcoal, confident tie or open collar, successful sales professional look
lighting_prompt: Bright confident lighting, energetic and welcoming, success-oriented atmosphere, vibrant and engaging
color_tone: Dynamic business palette, confident blues and warm accents, successful vibrant skin tones, winning colors

name: 市场总监形象照（女）
description: 市场总监职业形象照，展现战略视野与品牌氛围，适合市场总监、CMO、品牌负责人
style_prompt: Marketing director portrait, strategic and creative expression, brand-savvy professional, dynamic leadership with style, modern marketing authority
background_prompt: Trendy modern office or creative workspace blur, brand-conscious environment, dynamic marketing setting
clothing_prompt: Fashion-forward business attire, statement blazer or dress, contemporary professional with personal brand, stylish and authoritative
lighting_prompt: Modern vibrant lighting, dynamic and stylish, brand-conscious atmosphere, contemporary and engaging
color_tone: Vibrant modern palette, confident warm tones with contemporary edge, glowing skin, marketing creativity colors
